description: Execute a validated brief through Codex CLI — validate actions, run sequentially, report results

inputs.name: brief_file
inputs.description: Filename of the brief in output/ directory (e.g. brief_20260410_launch-something.json)

inputs.name: use_codex
inputs.description: Set to 'true' to use Codex CLI, 'false' for direct shell execution

on_failure.message: Brief execution failed — check output/results_*.json for details
